data.name: Settings.Language.Description
data.value: Select the display language for the application interface

data.name: Settings.Font.Arabic.Description
data.value: Choose a font for Arabic text display

data.name: Settings.Unsaved.Message
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Save before navigating?

data.name: Dashboard.Welcome
data.value: Welcome to Planova Enterprise Planning Platform

data.name: WelcomePage.Instruction
data.value: Select a feature from the sidebar to get started.

data.name: RelationshipGeneratorPage.ValidationHint
data.value: Validation results will appear here after generation.

data.name: RelationshipGeneratorPage.AnalysisHint
data.value: Parallel execution and critical path analysis will appear here.

data.name: RelationshipGeneratorPage.ExportHint
data.value: Export will add relationship columns to the active activity sheet.

data.name: BOQActivityGeneratorPage.AiSubtitle
data.value: Generate construction activities from BOQ data using AI

data.name: BOQActivityGeneratorPage.EmptyState
data.value: No activities generated yet. Click 'Generate Activities' above to start.

data.name: BOQActivityGeneratorPage.ExportHint
data.value: Export will create a 'Generated Activities' sheet in the active workbook.

data.name: BOQActivityGeneratorPage.PrivacyBody
data.value: This feature uses AI to generate construction activities from your BOQ data. The BOQ data will be sent to an AI provider for processing. No data is stored or used for training purposes. Do you consent to sending BOQ data for AI-powered activity generation?

data.name: WBSGeneratorPage.DescriptionHint
data.value: Describe your project type, scope, and key deliverables.

data.name: AssignTradeCodesPage.ReferenceMapHint
data.value: Ref: Activity in Column C, Trade Code in Column A

data.name: FixPieColorsPage.Instruction
data.value: Select chart ranges then click Run.

data.name: AIPanel.ApiKeyHint
data.value: (Cloud API key is required. If empty, local AI will be used.)

data.name: AppearancePanel.SampleBody
data.value: Sample body text for preview purposes

data.name: DiagnosticsPanel.SettingsExportHint
data.value: Export your current settings to a JSON file for backup or transfer to another machine.

data.name: ExcelPanel.SafeModeDescription
data.value: Force safe rendering mode for Excel compatibility

data.name: ExcelPanel.DpiDescription
data.value: DPI scaling is handled automatically by the Windows rendering pipeline. Adjust render mode if you experience display issues.

data.name: AccessibilityPanel.FocusIndicatorDescription
data.value: Show focus glow around selected elements
